creator: rihaz.jerrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 199061
[NEW PORT]: security/automater port file

Automater is a URL/Domain, IP Address, and Md5 Hash
OSINT tool aimed at making the analysis process easier
for intrusion Analysts. Given a target (URL, IP, or HASH)
or a file full of targets Automater will return relevant
results from sources like the following: IPvoid.com,Robtex.com
Fortiguard.com, unshorten.me, Urlvoid.com,Labs.alienvault.com
ThreatExpert, VxVault, and VirusTotal.

WWW: http://www.tekdefense.com/automater/
